shell-injection.description: Detects shell command injection patterns in skill files

secrets.description: Detects hardcoded API keys, tokens, and credentials in skill files

code-exec.description: Detects arbitrary code execution patterns in skill files

obfuscation.description: Detects obfuscated code, encoded strings, and suspicious encoding patterns

prompt-injection.description: Detects system prompt override and instruction injection patterns

network.description: Detects unexpected network calls and suspicious outbound connections

file-access.description: Detects file operations outside expected skill scope
